# Example app screenshots (docs site)

Drop PNG or WebP files here when they are ready. Planned filenames (reference from `example-apps.mdx`):

- `breathwork-trainer-desktop.png`
- `neuroflight-desktop.png`
- `monkey-mind-desktop.png`
- `neuro-chess-desktop.png`
- `reaction-trainer-desktop.png`

Optional mobile variants: `*-mobile.png` per app.

In Mintlify, reference them as `/images/examples/<filename>` from pages under `external/docs-site/`.
